data.body: I learned the border-blanking trick from a Demoware program from one of those famous European demo houses. It involved an IRQ routine that would somehow trick the VIC-II chip into not drawing the border. IIRC you could trigger an interrupt at a specific raster line & tweak the v-scroll register.
